title: Breach of union rules decision: Cromwell v App Drivers and Couriers Union
body: "Mr Cromwell made a complaint under 108A (1) of the Trade Union and Labour Relations (Consolidation) Act 1992 that the union breached its rule relating to disciplinary proceedings by the union (including expulsion)  The Certification Officer struck out the complaint under section 256ZA of the Trade Union and Labour Relations (Consolidation) Act 1992 on the grounds that the complaint, as advanced by Mr Cromwell, had no reasonable prospect of success. "
